title: ericameria filifolia
intro: Ericameria filifolia, also known as the forked goldenrod, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ericameria filifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, making it a popular natural remedy for colds and flu. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in salves and creams for topical application.
